case_title: LESLIE W. GILLETT et al RESPONDENT VS. WOON K. NGAI APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. REPORTER: NOT PRESENT. CAUSE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 501 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. ARGUED. COURT TRIAL ON JUL-18-2002 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JULY 18, 2002 BY JUDGE DAVID A. GARCIA.(501)
RECORD ON APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2002 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT NGAI, WOON K. RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF GILLETT, LESLIE W. MEKBEB-GILLETT, DEBRITU B. $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $86.00, BASED ON ALL THE EVIDENCE RECEIVED INCLUDING THE EXPERT TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY THE DEFENSE, THIS COURT CONCLUDES THAT THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO BEAR ITS BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING CAUSATION. ACCORDINGLY, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED FOR THE DEFENDANT. SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT NGAI, WOON K. AS TO RESPONDENT GILLETT, LESLIE W. MEKBEB-GILLETT, DEBRITU B. HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. TRIAL DE NOVO HELD ON JUL-18-02. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT AND AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF. COSTS - $86.00.(501)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT NGAI, WOON K. RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF GILLETT, LESLIE W. MEKBEB-GILLETT, DEBRITU B. $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $86.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
